use_codes.desc: METHOD OF TREATING ACROMEGALY PATIENTS WHO HAVE HAD INADEQUATE RESPONSE TO OR CANNOT BE TREATED WITH SURGICAL RESECTION, PITUITARY IRRADIATION, AND BROMOCRIPTINE MESYLATE AT MAXIMALLY TOLERATED DOSES
METHOD OF TREATING PROFUSE WATERY DIARRHEA ASSOCIATED WITH VASOACTIVE INTESTINAL PEPTIDE TUMORS (VIPOMAS)-SECRETING TUMORS
METHOD OF TREATING SEVERE DIARRHEA AND FLUSHING EPISODES ASSOCIATED WITH METASTATIC CARCINOID TUMORS
